text.title: Modern BA Framework Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: propose-framework
step.action: Pick the framework whose strengths match the top-2 axes.

step.name: justify-and-sign
step.action: Write rationale ≥80 chars; capture decided_by + decided_on.
